      state.sign = true;
    } else {
      if (stream.column() == 1 && state.lineTag && stream.match(keywords)) {
        //allow nospace after tag before the keyword

        if(stream.match(keywords)) {

  } else if (stream.eat("{")) {
    if (stream.eat("#")) {
      state.incomment = true;
      if(!stream.skipTo("#}")) {
        stream.skipToEnd();
      } else {
        stream.eatWhile(/\#|}/);
        state.incomment = false;
      }
      return "comment";
      //Open tag
    } else if (ch = stream.eat(/\{|%/)) {
      //Cache close tag
      state.intag = ch;
      state.inbraces = 0;
      state.inbrackets = 0;
      if(ch == "{") {
        state.intag = "}";
      }
      stream.eat("-");
      return "tag";
    }
    //Line statements
  } else if (stream.eat('#')) {
    if (stream.peek() == '#') {
      stream.skipToEnd();
      return "comment"
    }
    else if (!stream.eol()) {
      state.intag = true;
      state.lineTag = true;
      state.inbraces = 0;
      state.inbrackets = 0;
      return "tag";
    }
  }
  stream.next();
};

const jinja2 = {
  name: "jinja2",
  startState: function () {
    return {tokenize: tokenBase, inbrackets: 0, inbraces: 0};
  },
  token: function(stream, state) {
    var style = state.tokenize(stream, state);
    if (stream.eol() && state.lineTag && !state.instring && state.inbraces == 0 && state.inbrackets == 0) {
      //Close line statement at the EOL
      state.intag = false
      state.lineTag = false
    }
    return style;
  },
  languageData: {
    commentTokens: {block: {open: "{#", close: "#}", line: "##"}}
  }
};
